description:
See World.

The RecordEditForm component is used to edit the details and info/metadata for a world.

fields._worldOrb: The world orb that created this dialog.
fields._name: The field to edit the name of the world.
fields._description: The field to edit the description of the world.
fields._path: The field to edit the path of the world.
fields._tags: The field to edit the tags of the world.
fields._publicSetting: The field to edit the of the world.
fields._readonly: The checkbox to edit the read only property of the world.
fields._ownerUser: The field to show the owner of the world.
fields._privateOptionText: The field to show the private options of the world.

methods.OnCancel: Called when the cancel button is touched.
methods.OnSave: Called when the save button is touched.
